# FI Digital Australia

> FI Digital helps Australian organisations build software, engineer governed data platforms, deploy AI into real workflows, and modernise core business systems. Based in Melbourne with 200+ engineers across Australia, India, UAE, and UK.

## Services
- [Product Engineering](/product-engineering): Web apps, mobile apps, SaaS platforms, internal tools, product modernisation
- [Data Platforms & Intelligence](/data-platforms): Databricks, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric, BI, data governance, ESG reporting
- [AI Agents & Automation](/ai-agents): RAG, copilots, digital workers, document intelligence, workflow AI
- [Business Systems Modernisation](/business-systems): Zoho CRM, Books, Inventory, workflow automation, API integration

## Industries
- [Financial Services & Wealth](/industries/financial-services)
- [Healthcare & Aged Care](/industries/healthcare)
- [Resources, Mining & Logistics](/industries/resources-mining-logistics)

## Technology Stack
React, React Native, Python, FastAPI, Databricks, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric, Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4o (Azure OpenAI), n8n, LangChain, Zoho, AWS, Azure

## Company Details
- Entity: Digital Synergy Ventures Pty Ltd
- Website: https://fidigital.com.au
- UK: https://fidigital.co.uk
- Team: 200+ engineers (Melbourne, Sydney, India, UAE, UK)
- Contact: https://fidigital.com.au/contact
